title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Laurus Labs Capital India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Laurus Labs Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Laurus Labs Capital India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Laurus Labs Capital India:
Laurus Labs Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Laurus Labs Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
